content.mainTitle: Y2mate – Download YouTube Videos Fast & free
content.intro1: Y2mate is a free online YouTube downloader that allows you to convert and download YouTube videos into high-quality MP4 and MP3 formats directly from your browser. Our tool is 100% web-based, requiring no software installation or registration. You can easily pick the resolution that fits your needs, from 144p for quick previews to 1080p Full HD for a premium theater-like experience.
content.intro2: It's also a lifesaver if you're into music. Want to turn a cool YouTube cover into an MP3 for your morning run or set it as a custom ringtone? Y2mate handles that too, with high-quality audio options up to 320kbps.

instructions.title: How to Grab Your Video in Seconds
steps: Paste the link: Copy the YouTube URL you love and paste it into the search box above.
Let us analyze it: Hit "Start." We'll quickly fetch all the available formats and resolutions for you.
Pick your vibe: Want the full video (MP4) or just the song (MP3)? Choose the quality that fits your device.
Download & Go: Click "Convert," wait a moment for the process to finish, and save it. That's it-no registration, no drama!

whyChoose.title: Why Y2mate is Actually Useful
reasons: Top-Tier Audio: Don't settle for tinny sound. Extract audio in 320kbps MP3-perfect for building your personal high-quality music library.
Ready for Shorts: Love those quick YouTube Shorts? You can download them in their original vertical format to share on other apps or watch later.
Save Your Battery: Since all the heavy lifting (conversion) happens on our servers, your phone or laptop won't heat up or drain its battery.
Works Everywhere: Whether you're on a brand-new iPhone, an old Android, a Mac, or a Windows PC, as long as you have a browser, you're good to go.

items.question: How can I download YouTube videos as MP3 files?
items.answer: It's easy! Paste the YouTube link into Y2mate's search box, click "Start," and then select the Audio tab. Choose your preferred bitrate (like 320kbps for high quality) and hit "Convert." Your MP3 will be ready in seconds-perfect for listening to your favorite tracks offline.

items.question: Why is the download button not appearing or showing an error?
items.answer: Errors usually happen due to a temporary connection drop or if the video is set to Private. To fix this, simply refresh the page (F5) and paste the link again. If you're on a mobile device, make sure your browser isn't in "Incognito" mode, as it can sometimes block downloads.

items.question: Can I download videos in 1080p Full HD with sound?
items.answer: Yes! Y2mate supports Full HD downloads. While some other sites separate video and audio for 1080p, Y2mate combines them for you so you get a crisp, high-definition MP4 file with clear sound, ready for any screen.

items.question: How do I save YouTube videos directly to my iPhone or Android gallery?
items.answer:
On Android: Just download the file via Chrome, and it will automatically appear in your Gallery or Downloads folder.
On iPhone: Open Safari, download the file, and then tap the blue arrow in the address bar. Go to "Downloads," select the video, and tap "Save Video" to move it to your Photos app.

items.question: Is it legal to download videos via Y2mate?
items.answer: Y2mate is designed for downloading content for personal use, such as watching a video offline or saving a music cover for personal listening. Please respect the original creators and do not use the downloaded files for commercial purposes or copyright infringement.
